settings.title: Processing Times
settings.text: Orders are typically processed within 2–5 business days. Because many of our products are made to order, processing may take slightly longer during massive launches, promotions, and peak holiday periods as we maintain strict quality and order accuracy.

settings.title: Methods & Transit
settings.text: Transit time depends strictly on the shipping service selected at checkout and the final destination. Delivery estimates shown at checkout are carrier-based estimates and are not guaranteed delivery dates.

settings.title: Tracking & Updates
settings.text: Once your order is handed off to the carrier, you will receive a tracking link via email. Please allow up to 24–48 hours for tracking events to begin updating within the carrier's system.

settings.title: Address Accuracy
settings.text: Please verify all shipping details before placing your order. Candles By Victoria is not responsible for misdeliveries, returned packages, or delays caused by incorrect or incomplete address information submitted during checkout.

settings.title: Lost or Damaged
settings.text: If your package appears lost in transit, is significantly delayed by the carrier, or arrives damaged, please contact us immediately. Include your order number and photos of the damage (if applicable), and our team will assist you with next steps and carrier claims where appropriate.

settings.caption: Policy Information
settings.heading: Shipping Policy
settings.text: This page outlines exactly how Candles By Victoria processes, ships, and supports your orders from our hands to your home.
settings.cta_heading: Have a specific question about your order?
